Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, Memorandum Of Point And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EUI KANG'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

OFF CALENDAR. The court executed the parties' stipulation and order that vacates the default/default judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, Memorandum Of Point And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Continued To Feb-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
H. Kenneth Ahn, Esq. 415-474-8160 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Frank Kim, Esq. 415-567-5700 of National Legal Associates for Defendant Eui Kang.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Defendant reports parties met and conferred, Plaintiff to file a responsive pleading and request a continuance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT EUI KANG'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.
